title: CrockPot Tweaker
description: Use CraftTweaker to add CrockPot's recipes.
body:
# CrockPot Tweaker  
  
Use CraftTweaker to modify CrockPot's recipes.  
  
Supported:
- FoodValue (Only add)
- CookingRecipe (add & remove)
- ExplosionRecipe (add & remove)
- PiglinTrade (Only add)
  
This mod required CraftTweaker and CrockPot.
